---
name: Documentation
about: Report a problem or suggest improvements for documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Issue

What aspect of the documentation needs improvement?

- [ ] Inaccurate information
- [ ] Unclear explanation
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Out of content
- [ ] Broken links
- [ ] Code examples don't work
- [ ] Spelling/grammar errors

## Location

Which document/page needs improvement?

- README.md
- DEPLOYMENT.md
- MCP_SETUP_GUIDE.md
- CONTRIBUTING.md
- SECURITY.md
- Code comments
- API documentation
- Other: _____________

## Problem Description

Clearly describe what's wrong with the documentation.

## Proposed Changes

What should be added, removed, or changed?

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, links, or examples to help illustrate the issue.

## Checklist

- [ ] I've checked if this documentation already exists
- [ ] I've been specific about what needs improvement
- [ ] I've suggested how to fix it (if possible)
